Item Class: Waystones
Rarity: Rare
Unholy Direction
Waystone (Tier 15)
--------
Revives Available: 0 (augmented)
Item Rarity: +26% (augmented)
Pack Size: +9% (augmented)
Monster Rarity: +43% (augmented)
Monster Effectiveness: +13% (augmented)
Waystone Drop Chance: +110% (augmented)
--------
Item Level: 81
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Impacting" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 92(90-100)% increased Stun Buildup
{ Prefix Modifier "Painful" (Tier: 1) }
17(15-19)% increased Monster Damage
{ Prefix Modifier "Fleeting" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 13(10-15)% increased Attack, Cast and Movement Speed
{ Suffix Modifier "of Enduring" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters are Armoured
{ Suffix Modifier "of Overpowering" (Tier: 1) }
Monster have 118(100-119)% increased Elemental Ailment Application
{ Suffix Modifier "of Smothering" (Tier: 1) }
Players have 38(40-36)% less Recovery Rate of Life and Energy Shield
--------
Can be used in a Map Device, allowing you to enter a Map. Waystones can only be used once.
